---
title: "The Christmas Mummers"
sort_title: "Christmas Mummers"
year: 1858
subtitle: "1858"
slug: "christmas_mummers"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---



**[The Otterbourne Christmas Mummers](http://www.forest-tracks.co.uk/paulmarshs/pages/mummers.html)  
**(an article from Paul Marsh)

### ****Article relating to The Christmas Mummers****

[**Peter Millington**](http://freespace.virgin.net/peter.millington1/)has written a short interesting article relating to this book:  
  
**[Doctor Peter Lamb – A Mystery Solved](http://www.folkplay.info/Forum/TD_Forum_3_Lamb.htm)**  

**[Click here to read a short extract from Yonge's*Christmas Mummers*](http://www.folkplay.info/Texts/85su--yc.htm)**
